example.title: Customer login with 2FA exception
example.inputs: Actor: customer. Goal: access account dashboard.
example.output: { "use_case_id": "uc-login-2fa", "actor": "customer", "goal": "access account dashboard", "preconditions": ["customer has registered account", "2FA enabled"], "main_scenario": [ {"n": 1, "actor": "enters email + password"}, {"n": 2, "system": "validates credentials + sends 2FA code"}, {"n": 3, "actor": "enters 2FA code"}, {"n": 4, "system": "redirects to dashboard"} ], "alternate_flows": [{"branch_at": 3, "desc": "use SMS fallback if app token unavailable"}], "exception_flows": [{"branch_at": 3, "desc": "2FA code expired -> re-issue"}], "postconditions": ["customer on dashboard with active session"], "frequency": "10000 per day", "owner": "Maria Tkachuk" }
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (actor-goal-scenario), r2 (numbered steps), r3 (preconditions), r4 (alternate), r5 (exception).
